name: Sleet Storm
description: Sleet falls in a 40-foot-tall, 20-foot-radius Cylinder centered on a point within range. The area is Heavily Obscured, exposed flames are doused, and the ground is Difficult Terrain. A creature entering the area for the first time on a turn or starting its turn there must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall Prone. Concentration spellcasters in the area must also succeed on a Constitution save or lose Concentration. Engine simplification: the DEX save is rolled for creatures in the area at cast time (zone enter-save model).
